compiled_state.title: As a developer, playwright-debug uses @playwright/cli for browser interaction
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Migrate the playwright-debug skill from Playwright MCP tools (browser_run_code, browser_snapshot, browser_click, browser_hover, browser_navigate, browser_take_screenshot, browser_console_messages, browser_wait_for) to equivalent @playwright/cli Bash commands. Update the 3-tier debugging process (Tier 1 code analysis, Tier 2 targeted evidence, Tier 3 full interaction) to use CLI commands with disk-based output.
**Why**: playwright-debug is the primary browser automation skill and the most MCP-dependent — migrating it first establishes the CLI pattern for all other skills.
**Scope**:
- IN: Replace all 8 MCP tool references with CLI equivalents; update allowed-tools metadata; add pre-flight availability check; add output validation guards; use unique session names with worktree identifier; invoke CLI binary directly (not via npx)
- OUT: Changes to the 3-tier token budget structure (preserved as-is); changes to the hypothesis-first debugging methodology

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, playwright-debug uses @playwright/cli Bash commands for all browser interactions across Tier 2 and Tier 3, with no references to Playwright MCP tools
  ← Satisfies: "All 5 skills use @playwright/cli commands via Bash instead of MCP tools"
- When this story is complete, a regression test dispatches a sub-agent without MCP access and confirms playwright-debug completes a representative browser task (navigate + screenshot) via CLI
  ← Satisfies: "A regression test dispatches a sub-agent without MCP access and confirms browser automation works"
- When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Session names must include worktree identifier to prevent cross-contamination
- [Reliability] Invoke CLI binary directly to avoid npx stdout pollution
- [Security] Session directories must be scoped per-session to prevent auth state bleed
- [Testing] Output validation guards needed — verify artifacts are non-empty before proceeding

comments.body: Consideration: [Compatibility] validate-config.sh references skills.playwright_debug_reference config key. Decide whether to rename post-migration or preserve for backward compatibility.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Story complete: all tasks closed, CLI migration verified with tests
comments.author: Test
